sourcingNote: Hex colors confirmed from official SVG logo. RGB and CMYK confirmed from official NFL guidelines. Pantone confirmed by logo slick.
description: The Kansas City Chiefs are an NFL franchise based in Kansas City, Missouri, founded in 1960 as a charter member of the American Football League. They play at Arrowhead Stadium, one of the loudest venues in the NFL, and compete in the AFC West. The Chiefs are a dynasty of the modern era, winning multiple Super Bowl championships led by quarterback Patrick Mahomes.
